MALTA FINANCIAL SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT
(INDICES USED AS BENCHMARKS IN FINANCIAL
INSTRUMENTS AND FINANCIAL CONTRACTS OR TO
MEASURE THE PERFORMANCE OF INVESTMENT
FUNDS) (FEES)

[ L.S.330.21]

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.21
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (INDICES USED AS
BENCHMARKS IN FINANCIAL INSTRUMENTS AND
FINANCIAL CONTRACTS OR TO MEASURE THE
PERFORMANCE OF INVESTMENT FUNDS) (FEES)
1 ta’ Jannar, 2026

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 304 tal-2025.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
